principle: Use clean readable URLs with keywords — messy parameter URLs confuse both users and Google
explanation: X.seo|clean_urls: readable_URL == keyword_in_path + no_parameters + short; NO:parameter_urls NO:random_IDs eg: "examplesite.com/~articlepage21/post-entry321.asp?q=3" >> "examplesite.com/football-jerseys"

principle: Navigation must use real text links not images — image-based navigation is invisible to Google
explanation: X.seo|text_nav: main_navigation == real_text_links NOT images; image_nav -> internal_pages_invisible_to_google; add_links_to_important_pages_on_homepage -> spider_discovers_priority_pages; NO:image_navigation NO:animation_intros_before_content eg: "nav_built_from_image_sprites" >> "semantic_HTML_nav_with_text_links"

principle: Write meta title under 60 chars and meta description under 160 chars — unfilled tags get auto-generated gibberish
explanation: X.seo|meta_tags: title_tag <= 55-60_chars + compelling + keyword; meta_description <= 155-160_chars + actionable + specific; use_numbers + special_chars (pipes/dashes/brackets) -> higher_CTR; NO:leaving_meta_tags_empty NO:exceeding_char_limits eg: "auto_generated_gibberish_snippet" >> "Buy_NFL_jerseys_online._Free_delivery._Wide_range_of_sizes."

principle: Keep footer links to navigation essentials only — bloated footer link lists signal link spam to Google quality raters and dilute internal PageRank
explanation: X.seo|link_hygiene: Google_Search_Quality_Evaluators_flag: excessive_structural_links_in_footer/sidebar == spam_signal; keep_footer_links == only_most_important_pages + useful_for_users; list_real_editors + contributors NOT pseudonyms; provide_sources_for_articles; NO:keyword_link_farms_in_footer NO:pseudonym_authors NO:ads_bigger_than_content eg: "footer_with_200_keyword_links" >> "footer_with_10_essential_pages + about + contact + privacy"

principle: Aim for Flesch readability score 60-100 — top-ranking pages average score 76 readable by 13-15 year olds
explanation: X.seo|readability: Searchmetrics_data: top10_pages_avg_Flesch_score == 76; target: 60-100 == easily_readable; improve: fewer_words_per_sentence + shorter_syllable_words; readability -> wider_audience -> more_engagement -> higher_rankings; NO:academic_writing NO:complex_sentences eg: "utilizing_methodological_approaches_to_facilitate" >> "use_simple_methods_to_help"

principle: Meet Core Web Vitals thresholds: LCP under 2.5s, INP under 200ms, CLS under 10% layout shift
explanation: X.seo|core_web_vitals: LCP (loading) < 2.5s -> optimize_server + CDN + cache + serve_HTML_cache_first; INP (interactivity) < 200ms -> break_long_JS_tasks + reduce_JS_execution_time; CLS (visual_stability) < 10% -> set_image_dimensions + reserve_ad_space + avoid_dynamic_content_injection; NO:images_without_dimensions NO:heavy_JS_blocking_interaction eg: "page_jumps_around_while_loading_ads" >> "reserved_ad_slots + explicit_image_width_height"

principle: Structure voice search content as FAQ with 30-word answer paragraphs and Speakable schema markup
explanation: X.seo|voice_search: voice_results_drawn_from_top_search_results; content_format: conversational + FAQ_structure + H2_as_questions + 30_word_answer_paragraphs; prerequisites: fast_mobile + good_core_web_vitals; add_Speakable_schema_markup_to_label_audio_friendly_sections; NO:long_academic_paragraphs_for_voice eg: "dense_500_word_paragraph" >> "H2:How_do_I_change_a_tire? + 30_word_step_by_step_answer"
